warnings: Recurrence claims require a minimum of 3 comparable artifact-backed cases. Below that, status is insufficient_cases.
MET never claims recurrence without comparability across failure_shape, affected_systems, evaluated_fields, and source_type.
failure_prevented: MET claiming 'this keeps happening' from a single sample, distorting prioritization.
signal_improved: Each cluster surfaces occurrences, affected_systems, evidence_refs, and a recommended_input — only when the comparable case count meets the threshold.

clusters.recurring_failure_shape: EVL coverage partial for long-horizon dimension
clusters.recommended_input: Add at least one more comparable case before treating as recurring; current state is insufficient_cases.
